markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between VerticalScope and GrowthX for AI-driven content generation and community engagement](https://fathom.video/share/-wvH7EYaiS8RGF_KJtnfEs5TtsFhxKpx?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [VerticalScope seeks to leverage AI for increasing content velocity and quality in user-generated forums, particularly in automotive communities](https://fathom.video/share/-wvH7EYaiS8RGF_KJtnfEs5TtsFhxKpx?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [GrowthX specializes in AI-powered content workflows, primarily for editorial and programmatic content, but is open to exploring UGC applications](https://fathom.video/share/-wvH7EYaiS8RGF_KJtnfEs5TtsFhxKpx?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
  - [Both parties expressed interest in further discussions to explore customized solutions for VerticalScope's unique needs](https://fathom.video/share/-wvH7EYaiS8RGF_KJtnfEs5TtsFhxKpx?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for Thursday at 10am Pacific to dive deeper into VerticalScope's specific use cases and communities](https://fathom.video/share/-wvH7EYaiS8RGF_KJtnfEs5TtsFhxKpx?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)

## Topics

### VerticalScope's Business and Challenges

  - [Operates 1200+ enthusiast community forums across various niches](https://fathom.video/share/-wvH7EYaiS8RGF_KJtnfEs5TtsFhxKpx?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)
  - [Reaches \~120 million users/month with 2 billion+ posts of content](https://fathom.video/share/-wvH7EYaiS8RGF_KJtnfEs5TtsFhxKpx?tab=summary&timestamp=1941.0)
  - [Facing challenges in user engagement post-COVID and Google algorithm changes](https://fathom.video/share/-wvH7EYaiS8RGF_KJtnfEs5TtsFhxKpx?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Seeking ways to increase content velocity, quality, and user revisits, especially in automotive forums](https://fathom.video/share/-wvH7EYaiS8RGF_KJtnfEs5TtsFhxKpx?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)

### GrowthX's Capabilities and Approach

  - [Specializes in AI-powered content workflows for editorial and programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/-wvH7EYaiS8RGF_KJtnfEs5TtsFhxKpx?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Uses a "Content OS" approach to break down content creation into efficient workflows](https://fathom.video/share/-wvH7EYaiS8RGF_KJtnfEs5TtsFhxKpx?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Leverages AI to accelerate research, question generation, and content structuring](https://fathom.video/share/-wvH7EYaiS8RGF_KJtnfEs5TtsFhxKpx?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Customizes solutions based on client needs and objectives](https://fathom.video/share/-wvH7EYaiS8RGF_KJtnfEs5TtsFhxKpx?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Exploring AI applications for user-generated content in forum settings](https://fathom.video/share/-wvH7EYaiS8RGF_KJtnfEs5TtsFhxKpx?tab=summary&timestamp=1905.0)
  - [Increasing post frequency, quality, and SEO-friendliness](https://fathom.video/share/-wvH7EYaiS8RGF_KJtnfEs5TtsFhxKpx?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Leveraging VerticalScope's extensive data assets for potential AI training](https://fathom.video/share/-wvH7EYaiS8RGF_KJtnfEs5TtsFhxKpx?tab=summary&timestamp=1947.0)
  - [Scaling content generation across VerticalScope's large network of communities](https://fathom.video/share/-wvH7EYaiS8RGF_KJtnfEs5TtsFhxKpx?tab=summary&timestamp=1931.0)

### Next Steps

  - [Chris (VerticalScope) to send list of 20-30 focus sites and additional context](https://fathom.video/share/-wvH7EYaiS8RGF_KJtnfEs5TtsFhxKpx?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)
  - [Kyle (GrowthX) to review VerticalScope's sites, particularly Ben'sWorld.org](https://fathom.video/share/-wvH7EYaiS8RGF_KJtnfEs5TtsFhxKpx?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for Thursday at 10am Pacific to discuss specific use cases and potential solutions](https://fathom.video/share/-wvH7EYaiS8RGF_KJtnfEs5TtsFhxKpx?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
  - [GrowthX to consider and propose ideas for collaboration, including potential objectives and cost estimates](https://fathom.video/share/-wvH7EYaiS8RGF_KJtnfEs5TtsFhxKpx?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
